# Codex Prompts

Use [`docs/codex/INITIAL_CODEX_PROMPT.md`](../../../docs/codex/INITIAL_CODEX_PROMPT.md) as the initial implementation prompt for the first vertical slice.

The first slice is limited to the monorepo foundation, shared schemas, costing package, repository interfaces, in-memory repositories, state transition guards, S3 key builder, and tests. Do not start AWS integration in the first slice.
